content:
# Session 45 — summary

## Verdict: NO PROVER LANE — terminal closeout (9th consecutive)

`attempts_raw.jsonl` = `{no_prover_lane: true, iter: 45}`; `prover.jsonl` empty; `sync_leanok` iter=45
sha=`35b7bcd` +0/−0, `chapters_touched: []`. `git diff --stat HEAD -- '*.lean'` empty — no `.lean` edit
since iter-036, so no regression is possible.

## State (independently re-verified)
- `grep -rln sorry AlgebraicJacobian/`: typed sorries only in out-of-leg `Picard/QuotScheme.lean`
  (4 χ skeletons L126/165/201/228) and `Picard/RelativeSpec.lean`. `SectionGradedRing.lean:3880` is a
  COMMENT, not a typed sorry — the core leg file is SORRY-FREE.
- Deliverables intact, axiom-clean `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}`: `Grassmannian.represents`,
  `tautologicalQuotient_epi`, B1–B7 associativity, ∀L `GSemiring`, invertible-L `GCommSemiring`,
  `sectionGradedModule_gmodule`. No live prover frontier.

## Decision
No closable in-cone sorry exists ⇒ mechanical no-dispatch. All four standing non-options re-weighed and
declined exactly as iters 037–044: re-probe χ (cohomology/Snapper-gated), open the cohomology megaleg
(overreach — critic-validated H⁰ scope, not USER-opened), split the done file (busywork), name/repoint
anonymous pins (net-negative; manufactures merge conflicts). Reverse signal: USER_HINTS opens cohomology
scope, or a genuine in-cone sorry surfaces.

## Blueprint doctor (out-of-cone, do NOT edit)
`logs/iter-045/blueprint-doctor.md` flags dormant inherited chapters only: `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange`
(2 phantom covers for non-existent `FlatBaseChange{,Global}.lean` + 14 broken `\ref`), `Picard_GlueDescent`
(4 broken `\cref`/`\uses`), `Picard_QuotScheme` (13 broken `\cref`). All single-commit extraction artifacts
on chapters outside the 3-seed cone; no prover near them ⇒ phantom covers misroute nothing. Resolve at merge.

## Coverage debt
~356 `lean_aux` unmatched = inherited parent-blueprinted construction decls. Merge-time; not this leg's debt.

## Subagent skips
- lean-auditor: no `.lean` modified this iter; prior verdict (iter-036) had no live must-fix.
- lean-vs-blueprint-checker: no `.lean` received prover work this iter.
